description: Single source of truth for scope. Harness controls state transitions (pass-state gating).

rules.gating: Agent may request verification; only harness may set passing after verification exits 0

evidence.notes: Example: already passing at harness init

features.behavior: POST /api/items with valid JSON returns 201 and item id

evidence.notes: Only one feature may be active (WIP=1)

features.behavior: User can list items via GET /api/items with pagination default 20
